To improve Gemini throughput and save tokens, we should implement more precise `repo_memory_search` queries, limiting broad searches to specific file types or directories when possible. SMOKE_DEVELOPE_UPGRADES_013232

Max: A high-risk regression test for job matching is to verify that an employee with specific skills and location preferences is only presented with jobs that precisely match those criteria, and not jobs outside their scope. SMOKE_QA_REGRESSI_054061

I've posted a test-automation enhancement to the #upgrades channel. It suggests implementing automated visual regression testing for the mobile app to catch UI bugs early and ensure consistency. SMOKE_QA_UPGRADES_060627

One authentication vulnerability is insecure session management, where tokens can be stolen and replayed; a mitigation is to use short-lived, HTTP-only, secure cookies for session tokens and invalidate them on logout. SMOKE_SECURITY_AUTHRISK_135117

I've posted a security-hardening upgrade suggestion to the #upgrades channel, recommending the integration of SAST/DAST tools into our CI/CD pipelines to proactively catch vulnerabilities. SMOKE_SECURITY_UPGRADES_142951
Sophie: A crucial accessibility requirement to verify first is that all interactive elements are fully keyboard accessible, adhering to WCAG 2.1.1 Keyboard. SMOKE_UXREVIEW_A11YPRIO_183858
For a missing resource, the API should return a `404 Not Found` status code. SMOKE_APIREVIE_HTTPSEMA_188942
